messages.body: All right, thank you.
Its sent me another notification that it will withdraw from my account again
All of it
There will be no further deductions to your account
Hello Nina,  We’ve already cancelled the account and refunded Septembers payment
September's payment
The cancellation team is aligned with the same

I would like to formally cancel that call as it will not be necessary. I am writing to request an immediate cancellation of my account and a full refund. ​The service has not been helpful to my business goals, and I am u…
Sure Nina, I’ve informed the team. We will cancel your account and refund Septembers payment
What about my refund? I have asked for months and you have dragged this out.

Hello Nina,  Sure, you may go ahead and initiate the cancellation from the Zoca app. Here’s how -   1. Navigate to “more” from the homepage. 2. Click on “support” 3. And click on “delete account”  Post this you’ll have a…
Hello,   I have asked you a hand full of times to cancel this app. I wsnt a refund
Just tell me here once you’ve schedule the off-boarding call. Also let me know the date and time you schedule the same
